name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #1
description: Florentine Brainrot #1 is a glitch candy rot single-panel relic built around Medici and 404 Error Reliquary. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Re di Coppe, used here as the witness card. Medici left a receipt where the Blue-Check Prophet Collapse should have been. The small evidence marks become witnesses, not gimmicks. Serial MEDI-1 carries codon marker ATGGAAGATATATGTATT; Gematria marks FICINO at Σ 336.

attributes.value: a flaming auction paddle shaped like a hardware wallet
